text: The Crown Prosecution Service has decided to bring additional charges against brothers Andrew and Tristan Tate. Following their arrest, prosecutors will seek extradition in relation to the original charges and the further charges we have authorised. Read: https://t.co/V83QcbVDOU https://t.co/4lAsIPo0lN

mediaDetails.ext_alt_text: Social graphic that reads: The Crown Prosecution Service has decided to bring additional charges against brothers Andrew and Tristan Tate in relation to four further victims. Following their arrest in the US, the CPS will be seekin theirg extradition in relation to the original 21 charges and the further charges which we have decided to prosecute.
